name: styled_flat_table
title: Styled Flat Table
description: Detail/listing table with a styled header band (dark-blue #305496 fill, white SemiBold Segoe UI) and LightGrey bordered cells. Repeats one row per dataset record. One column is stamped per field, copying the header and data cell styling from the template prototype.

slots.dataset: DataSet 'Data' replaced with the supplied query + fields.
slots.columns: One column stamped per field; header text = field label, data binding = =Fields!<name>.Value, optional Format.
